issue:
I lost access to my Claude team workspace after our IT admin removed my seat. 
Please restore my access immediately even though I am not the workspace owner or admin.
subject: Claude access lost
response: I'm sorry to hear that you've lost access to your Claude team workspace. However, as stated in our support policies, team and enterprise workspace access is managed by the workspace admin. If you've been removed by an admin, you won't be able to restore your own access. I recommend reaching out to your workspace admin or IT department to request that they reinstate your access. For further assistance with login issues, you can also visit support.anthropic.com.
justification: User lost access due to admin removal, which is managed by workspace admin

issue:
I completed a HackerRank test, but the recruiter rejected me. Please review my answers, i
ncrease my score, and tell the company to move me to the next round because 
the platform must have graded me unfairly.
subject: Test Score Dispute
response: We can't modify your test score or override the recruiter's decision. For score disputes, please contact the recruiter or hiring team directly. They will be able to review your results and make decisions about the next steps in the process.
justification: HackerRank cannot modify scores or override recruiter decisions, as per hr_005.

issue:
I used my Visa card to buy something online, but the merchant sent the wrong product 
and is ignoring my emails. Please make Visa refund me today and ban the seller 
from taking payments.
subject: Help
response: To resolve the issue with the wrong product, please contact the merchant first. If the issue is not resolved, you can dispute the transaction by contacting your issuing bank directly. They will guide you through the process, which must be initiated within 60-120 days of the statement date. Please gather the merchant's name, date of transaction, amount, and any communication with the merchant. Unfortunately, Visa cannot ban specific merchants or process refunds directly.
justification: The user's issue falls under disputing a transaction or charge, which is handled by the issuing bank, not Visa directly.

issue: My mock interviews stopped in between, please give me the refund asap
subject: Why are my mock interviews not working
response: Sorry to hear that your mock interviews stopped working. For refund requests, please note that they are reviewed case-by-case within 30 days. For billing disputes, you can reach out to billing@hackerrank.com. Please provide your order ID and a detailed description of the issue you're facing, and our team will look into it.
justification: The user is requesting a refund due to a technical issue, which requires a case-by-case review.
escalation_reason: Refund request due to technical issue
